NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED TO DEFENDANT HAZEL AUTRY' MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE, SERVED ON PLAIINTIFF KEITH CARTHEN. ACCORDINGLY, THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS FOLLOWS: (1) WITHIN TWENTY (20) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER, PLAINTIFF WILL SERVE DEFENDANT, WITHOUT OBJECTION FULL AND COMPLETE RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT'S FORM INTERROGATORIES.(2) THE COURT WILL IMPOSE NO MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF AT THIS TIME.THE COURT WILL SIGN THE PROPOSED ORDER MR. BEARD HAS SUBMITTED BY EMAIL PRIOR TO THE HEARING IN COMPLIANCE WITH THE DIRECTIONS STATED IN THE TENTATIVE RULING. JUDGE PRO TEM: PAUL RENNE, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

MINI MINUTES:

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)

Defendant Hazel Autry'S Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One, And For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-31-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: (by Zoom)
John Beard, Esq. 415-278-9400 for Defendant/Moving party.

Counsel stipulates to the Judge Pro Tem.

The pro tem judge and counsel authorize the clerk to sign the stipulation form on their own behalf.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested/Discussed. No Opposition was filed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Hazel Autry'S Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One, And For Sanctions.

NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED TO DEFENDANT HAZEL AUTRY' MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE, SERVED ON PLAIINTIFF KEITH CARTHEN. ACCORDINGLY, THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS FOLLOWS:

(1) WITHIN TWENTY (20) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER, PLAINTIFF WILL SERVE DEFENDANT, WITHOUT OBJECTION FULL AND COMPLETE RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT'S FORM INTERROGATORIES.

(2) THE COURT WILL IMPOSE NO MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF AT THIS TIME.

The Court will sign the proposed order Mr. Beard has submitted by email prior to the hearing in compliance with the directions stated in the tentative ruling.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT HAZEL AUTRY's Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment And Default is OFF CALENDAR, moot. Order setting aside the default per stipulation entered on April 27, 2021. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Show Cause And Temporary Restraining Order
Off Calendar Jan-06-2021 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (through Court Call):
Alex Lemberg, Esq. 415-735-4124 of Open Door Legal for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance

Hearing is held. The Court asks re: compliance and the specifics of the preliminary injunction. Plaintiff updates the Court and requests a preliminary Injunction on basic utilities until the trial date. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Order to show Cause And Temporary Restraining Order.

Taken Under Submission.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. =(501/REQ)
